commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The remaining blockers are trust-boundary design, upgrade acceptance, and contributor real behavior proof rather than a narrow automation-only repair.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a new control-plane trust boundary and currently allows process-wide ACOS metadata to authorize unrelated ingress.; Review finding: [P1] Do not use process-wide ACOS provenance for ingress — src/acos/provenance.ts:106 - [P1... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in ACOS-controlled mode with env/protocol provenance fields, guards across agent, Gateway, channel, cron, exec, and apply_patch paths, docs, Swift protocol output, and tests.

PR surface: Source +265, Tests +238, Docs +58, Other +8. Total +569 across 24 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defects: source inspection shows normal CLI Gateway calls use CLI/write identity while the PR forwards ACOS controls only for admin/backend, and the new provenance helper reads process env when no per-request provenance was supplied.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are trust-boundary design, upgrade acceptance, and contributor real behavior proof rather than a narrow automation-only repair.
